justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially understood the user's request for "this week, latest Friday" but then struggled to find and book available slots within the specified timeframe, leading to repeated attempts and failures.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered slots that were immediately unavailable, failing to effectively negotiate or find viable alternatives for the user.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was highly inefficient due to the agent repeatedly suggesting and failing to book unavailable slots, leading to numerous unproductive turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was extremely frustrating as the agent consistently failed to book requested slots, leading to a prolonged and ultimately unsuccessful attempt to schedule an appointment until the very last turn.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's inability to book any of the initially suggested and seemingly available slots created a very poor customer experience, highlighting a significant flaw in its ability to manage real-time availability and booking.
